<?php /** * sect233r1 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect233r1 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(233, 74, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000001', '0066647EDE6C332C7F8C0923BB58213B333B20E9CE4281FE115F7D8F90AD' ); $this->setBasePoint( '00FAC9DFCBAC8313BB2139F1BB755FEF65BC391F8B36F8F8EB7371FD558B', '01006A08A41903350678E58528BEBF8A0BEFF867A7CA36716F7E01F81052' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('01000000000000000000000000000013E974E72F8A6922031D2603CFE0D7', 16)); } }
